CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-22-2014 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor an objection filed, the Court orders case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 3.1385. JUDGE CYNTHIA M. LEE; Clerk KCox; Proceedings not reported. (610)

ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-26-2014 Set For Order To Show Cause On Apr-22-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-28-2013 Continued To Mar-11-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Sep-24-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: LAUREN GELBER, ESQ., LAW OFFICES OF BRIAN LARSEN, 415.398.5000, FOR PLAINTIFF THOMAS WILLIAMS.
LEILA MONGAN, DEPUTY CITY ATTORNEY, 415.554.3800, FOR DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO.

RULING: NO ARGUMENT. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT is denied. Plaintiff has presented evidence creating a triable issue whether the bus driver acted negligently. (counsel for plaintiff to prepare a form of order mirroring the court's ruling and email to court- copying opposing counsel- for signature). Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Not reported.

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Sep-18-2012 Continued To Sep-24-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter.
RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. CROSS COMPLAINANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT is continued to September 24, 2012 per agreement of the parties.Judge: Curtis E. A. Karnow, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Not reported.
